features.name: unsigned-to-signed conversion via $signed cast in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a $signed() cast applied to an unsigned literal or signal inside a concatenation expression, used to widen an unsigned value to a signed wire by prepending a zero bit

features.name: bit-select from zero-padded signed concatenation
features.description: Code should include a bit-select of a specific index from a wire assigned via a zero-padded $signed() concatenation, representing the lowering of unsigned-to-signed width expansion

features.name: inferred-width uint to sint conversion width inference
features.description: Code should include an assignment from an uninferred-width unsigned signal to a signed output port, requiring the tool to infer that the signed result width equals input width plus one
